since_last: 74% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: BTC +1.10% · Gold +0.19% · Nasdaq100 +1.18%. 74% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.83%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.83%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +6.66%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +6.66%, TER +6.01%, BABA +5.68%, MU +5.58%, MDB +5.44%. Laggards: ORCL -2.90%, AAPL -2.53%, AI -2.32%, TLN -1.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.60% at $124.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
